content_of_post_to_answer: Is feeling heard important for mental well-being?
answer: Feeling heard matters because it is not only about receiving advice or having someone agree with us; it is about having our inner experience recognized as real. Many people can survive difficult situations better when they are understood, but struggle when they feel invisible. The overlooked part is that being heard also teaches us to listen to ourselves. Sometimes the deepest relief comes from no longer having to prove that our feelings make sense.
